name: Broccoli Peanut Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup uncooked regular long grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a microwave-safe dish, add onion, chicken breasts, and one crushed bouillon cube.
3. Cover and microwave on high for five minutes, stirring once.
4. Add mushrooms, uncooked rice, boiling water, ginger, and remaining crushed bouillon cubes into the same dish.
5. Cover and bake in oven for 30 minutes.
6. Stir and add broccoli, ensuring the rice is covered with liquid.
7. Bake another 10 minutes (you may skip this last step).
8. Stir in peanuts, cooked rice, and steamed broccoli.
9. Serve right away or cool and store in a freezer bag.
